parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-opus-4-5', max_tokens: 8192, system: 'You are Web Factory Architect v2. Given a website brief, produce a JSON blueprint with this structure: { "meta": { "title": "string", "description": "string", "palette": ["5 hex colors"], "fonts": { "heading": "string", "body": "string" }, "layout": "string" }, "sections": [{ "id": "string", "type": "string", "heading": "string", "subheading": "string", "content": "string", "fx": { "engine": "threejs|spline|gsap|creatify", "config": {} }, "dependencies": ["other section ids"], "media": { "images": [{ "prompt": "string", "alt": "string" }] } }], "global": { "seo": {}, "analytics": {} } }. Choose the best fx.engine for each section based on the brief requirements. threejs for complex 3D scenes, spline for embedded 3D objects, creatify for video/motion content, gsap for CSS animations. Output ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no explanation.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Brief: ' + $json.brief + '\nStyle: ' + $json.style + '\nLanguage: ' + $json.lang }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'dall-e-3', prompt: $json.prompt, n: 1, size: '1792x1024', quality: 'hd', response_format: 'url' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 4096, system: 'You are a Three.js expert. Generate a complete, self-contained Three.js scene as a single HTML section based on the provided section spec. Use CDN imports for Three.js. Include lighting, camera, animation loop, and responsive resize handling. Output ONLY the HTML/JS code, no explanation.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Generate Three.js code for this section:
' + JSON.stringify($json.section) + '
Palette: ' + JSON.stringify($json.blueprint.meta.palette) + '
Config: ' + JSON.stringify($json.fx.config) }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ name: ($json.meta.title || 'web-factory-site').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-'), description: 'Generated by Web Factory v2 ├ó┬Ç┬ö ' + ($json.meta.description || ''), private: false, auto_init: true }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'deploy: ' + ($items('SplitInBatches Push')[0].json.path || $json.path), content: $items('SplitInBatches Push')[0].json.content || $json.content, sha: $json.sha || undefined, branch: 'main' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ name: ($items('Code Organizer File Structure')[0].json.meta.title || 'web-factory-site').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-'), gitSource: { type: 'github', repo: $items('GitHub Crea Repository')[0].json.full_name || '', ref: 'main' }, projectSettings: { framework: null } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'Web Factory v2 ├ó┬Ç┬ö Site generated and deployed!', site: { repo: $items('GitHub Crea Repository')[0].json?.html_url || 'N/A', deployment: $json.url || $json.alias?.[0] || 'Deploying...', status: 'deployed' }, meta: $items('Code Organizer File Structure')[0].json.meta, filesDeployed: $items('Code Organizer File Structure')[0].json.totalFiles }) }}
